{{CargoRelic
|name=Star of David
|class_id=20718
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=09-25
|source=
|description=On Sep 25, 1354 AD, King Charles IV of Bohemia selected the Star of David flag as the symbol of the Jews.<br>The Star of David is a symbol of the Jews. It is a hexagonal star composed of 2 triangles intersecting and overlapping each other. The upright triangle represents King David, while the upside-down triangle represents his descendants. It's said that this symbol also appeared on King David's shield which made it magical and indestructible.
|fame=28
|art=28
|fth=47
|civ=26
|tech=25
|ss1=Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail HP +20<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail HP +40<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Snail RUSH +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill I.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail DEF +20
}}
